zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen於1279年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼時，他的父親Jean Ier De Picquigny32歲，母親Marguerite de Beaumetz24歲。他於1297年1月6日與Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens在法國皮卡迪索姆阿米安斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1340年在比利時海瑙特圖享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen于1279年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼时，他的父亲Jean Ier De Picquigny32岁，母亲Marguerite de Beaumetz24岁。他于1297年1月6日与Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens在法国皮卡迪索姆阿米安斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1340年在比利时海瑙特圖享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen was born in 1279, in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jean Ier De Picquigny, was 32 and his mother, Marguerite de Beaumetz, was 24. He married Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens on 6 January 1297, in Amiens, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1340, in Thuin, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen est né en 1279, à Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean Ier De Picquigny, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Beaumetz, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens le 6 janvier 1297, à Amiens, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1340, à Thuin, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen 1279 in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean Ier De Picquigny 32 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Beaumetz 24. Er hat am 6. Januar 1297 in Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1340 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Thuin, Hennegau, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen è nato il nel 1279 nel Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jean Ier De Picquigny, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Beaumetz, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens il 6 gennaio 1297, nel Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1340, nel Thuin, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouenが1279年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Jean Ier De Picquignyは32歳，母Marguerite de Beaumetzは24歳であった。1297年1月6日にフランスピカーディソンメアミエンスでMarthe Jeanne d'Amiensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年にベルギーヘイナトスウインで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen(이)가 1279년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean Ier De Picquigny(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Beaumetz(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1297년 1월 6일 프랑스 피카디 솜 아미스에서 Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 벨기에 하인오트 스인에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen nasceu em 1279, em Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean Ier De Picquigny, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Beaumetz, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens em 6 de janeiro de 1297, em Amiens, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1340, em Thuin, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen родился в 1279 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean Ier De Picquigny было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Beaumetz, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens 6 января 1297 г. в местности амиенс, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1340 г. в местности туин, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean De Picquigny II   Seigneur de Saint-Ouen nació en 1279, en Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier De Picquigny, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Beaumetz, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Marthe Jeanne d'Amiens el 6 de enero de 1297, en Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1340, en Thuin, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 61 años.
